# Hook Load

**Summary**: The total weight of the drilling pipes and equipment in the wellbore.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-algharbi|ALGHARBI, 2022]] used hook-load as a primary dynamic parameter to test data improvement methods.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-algharbi|ALGHARBI, 2022]] A critical parameter for monitoring drilling safety and progress.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-algharbi|ALGHARBI, 2022]] Measured via sensors on the rig.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Used as the target variable for ANN models to evaluate prediction accuracy. ([[2022-algharbi|ALGHARBI, 2022, p. 46]])
